translated: It suits her so well.
That sigh... she's just too cute.
Now for Shiho...
Shiho's Training card.
Thank you so much for this, really.
Thank you for drawing such a lovely illustration.
It makes me so happy.
I could just spin around.
Really.
Wait a second.
Looking at the YouTube comments and seeing myself spin on the lag,
is so embarrassing.
Is she okay?
She looks drowsy. Maybe she slept too much the day before.
She looks so sleepy.
Very much so.
Plus, on the wall in the back, is that a photo
from the autumn shuffle event? Having that there is a nice touch.
I should look at this instead of that.
This is really great.
I'm happy I can see the details of Shiho's room like this,
and even the soles of her feet.
Usually, they're wearing shoes,
or you just can't see their feet at all.
Seeing the soles of a character's feet, especially a 2D one,
is actually kind of nice.
What am I even saying?
Am I a creep?
I'm going to get scolded,
by the devs.
"Please don't look at things like that!"
Then don't draw it in the first place, honestly!
They'll ask me what's wrong with me.
No, no, I'm just overflowing with love.
And that was only the Pre-Training version.
Let's look at the Post-Training one too.
Oh, it went back.
Post-Training.
This is nice.
So cute.
That varsity jacket...
And...
it's rare to see her with something like tea.
Maybe it's apple tea?
I have a feeling it is.
She's drinking that... I didn't know Shiho drank apple tea.
It really gives off that vibe.
It's lovely.
The location looks like it's in front of a music store, which really fits her.
Also, since Shiho's character color is light green,
using a green apple like this is a great touch.
It's so good.
I almost spun around again.
I was about to spin again.
My apologies.
And finally... Saki.
This is Saki's 2-star card.
When Saki wears it, the atmosphere changes,
and she looks so much more mature. It's amazing.
Really amazing.
The logo on the sleeve is great too. I want that logo.
Leo/need.
The Ln logo.
I want it so bad, I wish they'd make it into merch.
Someone said it's okay to spin as many times as I want.
But it's embarrassing, so I'll stop.
You usually do these After Talks alone, at your own pace,
so I end up acting like my usual self, which is embarrassing to watch later.
Even though it's an official stream, I'm just going at my own pace,
so I start to wonder if this is really okay.
I'm so sorry, really.
I really want that Leo/need logo.
I want them to release it as a patch or something.
Please make it happen someday, higher-ups.
